comments.raw_text:
Update the MDN suggestions row UI. See [the Figma spec](https://www.figma.com/design/HlHYKdDVCszbbpjuovBDjg/Carrots---S-S-Online-Explorations?node-id=6584-5018&t=Xg06pmlLPj9lmpCj-0):

* Look into using that blue "M" icon shown in the Figma -- where did it come from? Is it the current MDN icon? Right now MDN suggestions use a white "M" against a black background, see [this doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nlWMosslcY47jbz0_ILJhaBHCTCjAHlGDnG8JiQM4a8/edit?usp=sharing).
* Update the title as shown in the Figma, e.g.: "Array – Javascript | MDN · Mozilla Developer Network"
* Replace current bottom text with "Recommended"
* Remove the "Feedback" label from the result menu button
* Move the URL to the bottom and show it only on hover and selection
* It's not clear yet how/whether the long description text should change, we'll need to check on that in later

bug_data.description:
Update the MDN suggestions row UI. See [the Figma spec](https://www.figma.com/design/HlHYKdDVCszbbpjuovBDjg/Carrots---S-S-Online-Explorations?node-id=6584-5018&t=Xg06pmlLPj9lmpCj-0):

* Look into using that blue "M" icon shown in the Figma -- where did it come from? Is it the current MDN icon? Right now MDN suggestions use a white "M" against a black background, see [this doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nlWMosslcY47jbz0_ILJhaBHCTCjAHlGDnG8JiQM4a8/edit?usp=sharing).
* Update the title as shown in the Figma, e.g.: "Array – Javascript | MDN · Mozilla Developer Network"
* Replace current bottom text with "Recommended"
* Remove the "Feedback" label from the result menu button
* Move the URL to the bottom and show it only on hover and selection
* It's not clear yet how/whether the long description text should change, we'll need to check on that in later

bug_analysis.root_cause: Outdated and inconsistent MDN suggestions row UI in the Firefox address bar that needed updating to match new design specs including icon usage, title format, labels, and URL visibility behavior.
symptoms: MDN suggestions use a white 'M' on black background instead of the new blue 'M' icon
Title format is not updated as per new design
Bottom text and labels are outdated ('Feedback' label present, incorrect bottom text)
URL is always visible instead of only on hover/selection
Inconsistent UI elements causing visual and interaction discrepancies
reproduction_steps: Trigger MDN suggestions by typing relevant queries
Observe the MDN suggestions row UI for icon, title, labels, and URL display behavior
bug_analysis.technical_details: Multiple commits were pushed to standardize the MDN suggestion row UI following a Figma spec, including icon update, title format, label removals, and hover behavior for URLs. A prior commit caused build compatibility failures leading to a backout. Crash reports were linked but not directly attributed to this UI update.
bug_analysis.user_impact: Users experienced inconsistent and outdated UI in MDN suggestions within the address bar, potentially reducing clarity and visual coherence of suggestions.

common_patterns: Crashes related to UI operations involving tabs or startup sequences
Crashes occurring in low-level native libraries such as libc.so, libart.so, or libbase.so
Hangs or crashes possibly triggered by resource exhaustion (e.g., Out Of Memory)
potential_root_causes: Resource exhaustion leading to unstable state or crashes (OOM)
Race conditions or use-after-free errors during UI rendering or tab management
Native code faults in dependencies or bindings used during startup or tab activation
relevant_fix_clues: No bugs are marked resolved, indicating unresolved issues
Descriptions mention hangs and crashes linked to inactive tabs and startup, suggesting a systemic problem in tab lifecycle management or initialization
Crash signatures involving libc.so, libart.so, and libbase.so imply native layer faults rather than purely JavaScript or frontend bugs
similar_bugs_context.summary: These similar bugs suggest that the crashes share a root cause likely tied to resource management and native code stability during critical UI operations such as tab activation and browser startup. The lack of resolved statuses and common crash signatures point toward unresolved issues in handling inactive tabs and startup sequences, possibly due to memory exhaustion or race conditions in native libraries.

similar_bugs_data.summary: opening 'inactive tabs' hangs and crashes probably due to OOM
startup Crash in [@ libc.so | libart.so | libbase.so]

common_patterns: Crashes related to UI operations involving tabs or startup sequences

Native code faults in dependencies or bindings used during startup or tab activation

Crash signatures involving libc.so, libart.so, and libbase.so imply native layer faults rather than purely JavaScript or frontend bugs
similar_bugs_analysis.summary: These similar bugs suggest that the crashes share a root cause likely tied to resource management and native code stability during critical UI operations such as tab activation and browser startup. The lack of resolved statuses and common crash signatures point toward unresolved issues in handling inactive tabs and startup sequences, possibly due to memory exhaustion or race conditions in native libraries.

refined_analysis.root_cause: The MDN suggestion row UI in Firefox's address bar is outdated and inconsistent with current design specs, showing an incorrect icon, obsolete labels, improper title formatting, and URL visibility behavior.
symptoms: MDN suggestions display a white 'M' icon on black instead of the updated blue 'M' icon
Title formatting does not match updated design
Obsolete labels such as 'Feedback' remain visible
URLs are always visible instead of only on hover or selection
Visual and interaction inconsistencies in the MDN suggestion row UI
reproduction_steps: Observe MDN suggestion row UI for icon, title, labels, and URL visibility
refined_analysis.technical_details: Recent commits aimed to align the MDN suggestion UI with Figma designs by replacing the icon with the new blue 'M', updating title formatting, removing outdated labels, and restricting URL visibility to hover/selection. A previous update was reverted due to build failures unrelated to UI logic.
refined_analysis.user_impact: Users encounter outdated, inconsistent MDN suggestions, reducing clarity and visual coherence in the address bar.
proposed_fix_approach: 1) Replace the white 'M' icon with the new blue 'M' icon as per latest assets.
2) Update title formatting to match current design specs.
3) Remove obsolete labels such as 'Feedback' from the suggestion row.
4) Modify URL visibility to show URLs only on hover or selection.
5) Ensure all visual and interaction behaviors align fully with the Figma design.
refined_analysis.optimized_context: The MDN suggestion row UI in browser/components/quickSuggest/browser_quicksuggest_mdn.js and browser/components/urlbar/UrlbarProviderQuickSuggest.sys.mjs uses an outdated white 'M' icon, incorrect title formatting, obsolete labels like 'Feedback', and always-visible URLs. Update these files to replace the icon with the new blue 'M', remove obsolete labels, fix title formatting, and restrict URL visibility to hover or selection states, ensuring full compliance with the latest Figma design.
refined_analysis.refinement_critique: The analysis correctly identifies the UI bug and affected files but is too verbose and includes irrelevant details (e.g., unrelated crash reports). It lacks explicit references to specific functions or code locations where changes should be applied, reducing AI-readiness. The reproduction steps and symptoms could be more concise. The proposed fix is a good high-level sketch but should be broken down into clearer, actionable steps. The optimized_context field is present but still verbose and can be tightened further to explicitly name files and main UI elements to update. Overall, the analysis is mostly self-contained but can improve by trimming noise, adding precise implementation targets, and sharpening scope for better AI guidance.

filtered_context.concise_summary: Update the MDN suggestion row UI in browser/components/quickSuggest/browser_quicksuggest_mdn.js and browser/components/urlbar/UrlbarProviderQuickSuggest.sys.mjs by replacing the outdated white 'M' icon with the new blue 'M', correcting title formatting, removing obsolete labels like 'Feedback', and restricting URL visibility to hover or selection states to fully match the latest Figma design.
core_symptoms: Outdated white 'M' icon instead of new blue 'M'
Presence of obsolete labels such as 'Feedback'
URLs always visible instead of only on hover or selection
technical_constraints: Icon replacement must use latest design assets
Title formatting must match current design specs
URL visibility limited to hover or selection states
Ensure all visual and interaction behaviors conform to Figma design
